overall.description: A stationary first-person perspective in a video game engine (resembling GTA V) showing a covered commercial walkway with red tiled walls and a large digital billboard displaying glitching 'SPC Drive-In Theater' advertisements. The scene features artificial lighting mixed with natural light from the corridor entrance, and a pedestrian briefly walks through the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial walkway with digital advertising display

events.description: digital billboard glitches, text temporarily disappears leaving only the SPC logo
billboard display flickers again, showing partial text before returning to full advertisement

agents.ego_description: stationary first-person view focused on the glitching digital billboard in the covered walkway

entered.detail: large purple-framed digital screen displaying animated 'SPC Silver Pixel Club Drive-In Theater' advertisement with glitching effects
vertical wall surface covered in glossy red rectangular tiles
covered walkway extending into the distance with ceiling lights and shop entrances

segments.scene_description: The camera remains stationary in a covered commercial walkway, focused on a large digital billboard that periodically glitches and flickers. The red tiled wall dominates the left side while the corridor extends into the background. No pedestrians are present, and the artificial lighting creates a warm, enclosed atmosphere typical of an urban shopping arcade.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial walkway with digital advertising display

events.description: pedestrian in purple hoodie enters frame from right side of corridor
pedestrian exits frame to the left, corridor returns to empty state

agents.ego_description: maintaining stationary position while observing the corridor and passing pedestrian

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in purple hoodie and cap walking from right to left across the corridor background

segments.scene_description: The scene continues in the covered walkway with the digital billboard still glitching. A pedestrian wearing a purple hoodie enters from the right side of the corridor, walks across the background, and exits left. The environment remains otherwise unchanged with the red tiled wall prominent on the left and the commercial corridor extending into the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a stationary first-person perspective within a covered commercial walkway that transitions from a quiet, enclosed space to one briefly interrupted by human activity. It begins focused on a large digital billboard that periodically glitches and flickers against a backdrop of red tiled walls and a deep urban corridor. As the artificial lighting maintains a warm, static atmosphere, the stillness of the shopping arcade is broken when a pedestrian in a purple hoodie enters from the right. The camera continues to observe the flickering advertisement as the figure walks across the background and exits to the left. The scene finally returns to its initial state of solitude, leaving only the rhythmic glitching of the billboard within the empty corridor.
